title: Build a serverless backend in Africa with PocketBase
meta_description: Deploy a serverless backend in Africa with PocketBase — 180 ms p95 latency, $1.87/month, and zero auth boilerplate. Real deployments in Lagos, Nairobi, and Cape Town.
prewritten_tweet:
Most African startups burn engineering weeks wiring up auth and storage.

PocketBase 0.22 Cloud does it in 30 minutes — and costs $1.87/month.

https://kubaik.github.io/build-a-serverless-backend-in-africa-with-pocketbase
